headline: Franklin Resources (BEN) Buys 250 Digital And Launches Franklin Crypto
summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) has completed its acquisition of 250 Digital. The company has launched a new Franklin Crypto division focused on active cryptocurrency investment management. This move expands Franklin Resources’ digital asset capabilities beyond previously reported ETF filings and product launches. Franklin Resources, the global asset manager behind the Franklin Templeton brand, is moving further into digital assets with the acquisition of 250 Digital and the creation of...
